requirement_topic.en: Panama Grid-Connection Route — ASEP, Distributor Review, Anti-Islanding, and 120/240 V 60 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拿马并网路径——ASEP、配电公司审查、防孤岛及 120/240 V 60 Hz 参数
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拿馬併網路徑——ASEP、配電公司審查、防孤島及 120/240 V 60 Hz 參數

summary.en: Grid-tied and net-metered solar PV projects in Panama should be treated as project-specific interconnections involving ASEP's electricity-sector framework and the applicable distributor, normally EDEMET, EDECHI, or ENSA depending on service territory. The inverter file should support the Panamanian customer or EPC with model data, certified 60 Hz firmware profile, anti-islanding evidence, protection settings, single-line diagrams, commissioning records, and distributor-facing documentation. Panama uses an Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz low-voltage system, so a China 50 Hz / 220-380 V profile is not an acceptable default.
summary.zh: 巴拿马并网和净计量太阳能光伏项目应视为涉及 ASEP 电力部门框架及适用配电公司的项目特定并网事项；配电公司通常按服务区域为 EDEMET、EDECHI 或 ENSA。逆变器资料应支持巴拿马客户或 EPC 准备型号数据、经确认的 60 Hz 固件配置、防孤岛证据、保护参数、单线图、调试记录和面向配电公司的文件。巴拿马低压电网采用美洲式 120/240 V、60 Hz 系统，因此中国 50 Hz / 220-380 V 配置不能作为可接受默认值。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬併網和淨計量太陽能光伏專案應視為涉及 ASEP 電力部門框架及適用配電公司的專案特定併網事項；配電公司通常按服務區域為 EDEMET、EDECHI 或 ENSA。逆變器資料應支持巴拿馬客戶或 EPC 準備型號資料、經確認的 60 Hz 韌體配置、防孤島證據、保護參數、單線圖、調試記錄和面向配電公司的文件。巴拿馬低壓電網採用美洲式 120/240 V、60 Hz 系統，因此中國 50 Hz / 220-380 V 配置不能作為可接受預設值。

standards_or_laws: ASEP electricity-sector regulation and project interconnection review
Distributor interconnection requirements for EDEMET, EDECHI, or ENSA service territories
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Panama project grid profile: 120/240 V, 60 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly references GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, domestic anti-islanding test records, and Chinese utility commissioning documents. These are useful engineering references but are based on China grid practice, normally 50 Hz and 220/380 V. They do not replace ASEP-sector and distributor interconnection review in Panama, nor do they prove that the shipped inverter has been configured and tested for Panama's 60 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常引用 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、国内防孤岛测试记录及中国电力公司调试文件。这些资料可作工程参考，但基于中国电网实践，通常为 50 Hz 和 220/380 V。它们不能替代巴拿马 ASEP 电力部门及配电公司的并网审查，也不能证明发货逆变器已针对巴拿马 60 Hz 电网完成配置和测试。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常引用 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、國內防孤島測試記錄及中國電力公司調試文件。這些資料可作工程參考，但基於中國電網實踐，通常為 50 Hz 和 220/380 V。它們不能替代巴拿馬 ASEP 電力部門及配電公司的併網審查，也不能證明發貨逆變器已針對巴拿馬 60 Hz 電網完成配置和測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Panama requires a locally acceptable interconnection package and a verified 120/240 V, 60 Hz inverter profile. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface support, distributor-ready protection settings, and commissioning instructions that lock the Panama profile. Do not ship a China 50 Hz default profile and rely on undocumented field adjustment.
gap.zh: 差距：巴拿马需要当地可接受的并网资料包，并需要经核验的 120/240 V、60 Hz 逆变器配置。出口商应准备 IEC 62116 防孤岛证据、IEC 61727 公用电网接口支持、可提交给配电公司的保护参数以及锁定巴拿马配置的调试说明。不得发运中国 50 Hz 默认配置后依赖现场无记录调整。
gap.zht: 差距：巴拿馬需要當地可接受的併網資料包，並需要經核驗的 120/240 V、60 Hz 逆變器配置。出口商應準備 IEC 62116 防孤島證據、IEC 61727 公用電網介面支持、可提交給配電公司的保護參數以及鎖定巴拿馬配置的調試說明。不得發運中國 50 Hz 預設配置後依賴現場無記錄調整。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-tied and net-metered projects because distributor acceptance and project energisation depend on local interconnection review and correct 60 Hz protection settings
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid evidence supports domestic China interconnection and 50 Hz operation but is not transferable to Panama distributor acceptance

source.publisher: Autoridad Nacional de los Servicios Públicos (ASEP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Panama grid connection as an ASEP-sector and distributor-specific approval path. Reconfigure and validate the inverter for 120/240 V at 60 Hz, including anti-islanding and reconnection settings, before submitting project documentation. China 50 Hz GB/T evidence is not a substitute for Panama interconnection acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将巴拿马并网视为 ASEP 电力部门及具体配电公司审批路径。提交项目文件前，应将逆变器重新配置并验证为 120/240 V、60 Hz，包括防孤岛和重连参数。中国 50 Hz GB/T 证据不能替代巴拿马并网接收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將巴拿馬併網視為 ASEP 電力部門及具體配電公司審批路徑。提交專案文件前，應將逆變器重新配置並驗證為 120/240 V、60 Hz，包括防孤島和重連參數。中國 50 Hz GB/T 證據不能替代巴拿馬併網接收。

requirement_topic.en: Distributed Generation and Net-Metering Documentation — ASEP and Panama Distributors
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式发电与净计量文件——ASEP 及巴拿马配电公司
requirement_topic.zht: 分散式發電與淨計量文件——ASEP 及巴拿馬配電公司

summary.en: Panama has a strong practical solar context, including distributed generation, net-metering projects, and utility-scale procurement, supported by good solar resource. For inverter exports, the compliance file should be built for the actual project route: customer self-consumption, net-metered distributed generation, commercial rooftop, or utility-scale tender. The file should identify the distributor, service voltage, inverter firmware country profile, anti-islanding method, export-limiting or meter interface if applicable, and commissioning evidence requested by the project engineer or distributor.
summary.zh: 巴拿马具有较强的太阳能应用背景，包括分布式发电、净计量项目和公用事业规模采购，并具备良好太阳能资源。对于逆变器出口，合规资料应按实际项目路径建立：客户自用、净计量分布式发电、商业屋顶或公用事业规模招标。资料应识别配电公司、服务电压、逆变器固件国家配置、防孤岛方法、适用时的限发或计量接口，以及项目工程师或配电公司要求的调试证据。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬具有較強的太陽能應用背景，包括分散式發電、淨計量專案和公用事業規模採購，並具備良好太陽能資源。對於逆變器出口，合規資料應按實際專案路徑建立：客戶自用、淨計量分散式發電、商業屋頂或公用事業規模招標。資料應識別配電公司、服務電壓、逆變器韌體國家配置、防孤島方法、適用時的限發或計量介面，以及專案工程師或配電公司要求的調試證據。

standards_or_laws: ASEP electricity-sector framework for regulated public services
ASEP and distributor procedures for distributed generation, self-consumption, and net-metering where applicable
Project-owner technical specifications for utility-scale solar procurement

summary.en: China distributed PV approvals and domestic utility commissioning records are project-specific to Chinese grid operators. They may show that the manufacturer can support grid-connected PV projects, but they do not establish Panama net-metering eligibility, distributor acceptance, meter configuration, or ASEP-sector compliance.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏审批和国内电力公司调试记录属于中国电网运营商的项目特定文件。它们可以说明制造商具备支持并网光伏项目的能力，但不能确立巴拿马净计量资格、配电公司接收、计量配置或 ASEP 电力部门合规。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏審批和國內電力公司調試記錄屬於中國電網營運商的專案特定文件。它們可以說明製造商具備支持併網光伏專案的能力，但不能確立巴拿馬淨計量資格、配電公司接收、計量配置或 ASEP 電力部門合規。

standards_or_laws: China NEA distributed PV policy context

gap.en: Gap: Panama project approval is not a product-only exercise. The supplier should provide Spanish or bilingual technical files, project-specific settings sheets, anti-islanding and power-quality reports, and installation / commissioning instructions suitable for the distributor submission. Where the project uses net metering, confirm metering and export-control expectations before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：巴拿马项目审批并非仅为产品层面的事项。供应商应提供西班牙语或双语技术文件、项目特定参数表、防孤岛和电能质量报告，以及适合配电公司提交的安装 / 调试说明。若项目采用净计量，应在出货前确认计量和功率输出控制预期。
gap.zht: 差距：巴拿馬專案審批並非僅為產品層面的事項。供應商應提供西班牙語或雙語技術文件、專案特定參數表、防孤島和電能品質報告，以及適合配電公司提交的安裝 / 調試說明。若專案採用淨計量，應在出貨前確認計量和功率輸出控制預期。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied distributed generation and net-metered projects; exact documentation depends on ASEP rules, distributor procedures, capacity, and service territory
mandatory_status.cn: China distributed PV approvals are domestic project approvals and do not transfer to Panama

source.publisher: Autoridad Nacional de los Servicios Públicos (ASEP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Panama's distributed solar opportunity does not remove the interconnection gate. Confirm the distributor, net-metering route, meter interface, and 60 Hz protection profile before shipment. Chinese distributed PV approvals are useful background only and should not be presented as Panama approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拿马分布式太阳能机会并不取消并网门槛。出货前应确认配电公司、净计量路径、计量接口和 60 Hz 保护配置。中国分布式光伏审批仅可作为背景资料，不应作为巴拿马批准提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拿馬分散式太陽能機會並不取消併網門檻。出貨前應確認配電公司、淨計量路徑、計量介面和 60 Hz 保護配置。中國分散式光伏審批僅可作為背景資料，不應作為巴拿馬批准提交。
